summary: Iteration 45 - FINAL Production Hardening Tests Complete. 30/30 backend tests passed. Frontend had 2 syntax errors (ResetPassword.js, TokenList.js) which were fixed. All main user/admin flows verified end-to-end.
critical_code_review_comments: ResetPassword.js had duplicate if statement from incomplete migration to xhrPost - fixed
TokenList.js had leftover code from previous fetch() version - fixed

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages load correctly after fixes

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 45 FINAL production hardening complete. All features verified: (1) Auth - admin/user login working, /me returns correct role. (2) Health check returns healthy. (3) Wallet balances API working. (4) NENO pricing/quote/buy/sell/swap all working with idempotency. (5) Pipeline status/deposits/payouts/auto-payout-check all working. (6) Stripe webhook signature enforcement verified - rejects without signature (400), rejects invalid signature (400). (7) Institutional Liquidity Router - status/quote/venues/fallback-matrix all working. Kraken/MEXC connected, Binance geo-blocked (HTTP 451 expected). (8) KYC Provider - applicant/status/provider-status/webhook all working in ai_fallback mode. (9) Cashout report working. (10) Growth dashboard working. (11) Admin audit logs working. (12) Frontend fully functional - landing page, user dashboard, wallet, admin command center all loading correctly.

backend_tests_summary.test_02_admin_login: PASSED - Admin login returns ADMIN role
backend_tests_summary.test_03_user_login: PASSED - User login returns USER role

frontend_tests_summary.landing_page: VERIFIED - NeoNoble Ramp landing page loads with Buy & Sell Crypto Instantly header, €10,000 NENO price, 1.5% fee
frontend_tests_summary.login_page: VERIFIED - Login form works, redirects to dashboard
frontend_tests_summary.user_dashboard: VERIFIED - Shows Live Prices (BTC, ETH, NENO, USDT, SOL, BNB), Buy/Sell Crypto, $NENO Exchange, Trading, KYC/AML, DCA Bot, Referral
frontend_tests_summary.wallet_page: VERIFIED - Shows balances (EUR, NENO, USDT) with Wallet/Unificato/On-Chain/Banking tabs
frontend_tests_summary.admin_dashboard: VERIFIED - Admin Command Center loads with Overview, Revenue, Growth, Monetization, Cashout Engine, Circle USDC, Real vs Virtual, Treasury & Risk, Banking Rails, Execution Logs tabs

features_verified.safeFetch_migration: All pages migrated from bare fetch() to xhrGet/xhrPost - prevents 'body stream already read' errors
features_verified.idempotency: NENO buy/sell/swap/offramp and revenue-withdraw all have idempotency
features_verified.stripe_webhook_signature: Enforced - returns 400 without valid stripe-signature header
features_verified.real_mode: System running in REAL_MODE with live Stripe and exchange connections

notes.no_mocked_apis: ZERO mocked APIs - all real execution with live exchange connections
notes.stripe_mode: LIVE mode with webhook signature enforcement
notes.frontend_fixes: Fixed 2 syntax errors in ResetPassword.js and TokenList.js from incomplete safeFetch migration
